---
title: "Outreach & Creative Projects"
toc: true
---

Beyond academic research, I participate in science communication, digital content creation, and collaborative design projects aimed at opening up academic and scientific spaces.

## Science Communication & Outreach

### The bel.sciences Project (STEMentiel!)
As part of the broader **STEMentiel!** initiative, I contribute to **bel.sciences**, a digital outreach project focused on sharing diverse pathways into exact sciences. I produce video content and conduct short interviews across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, highlighting students and researchers in mathematics and physics from a wide range of backgrounds. 

* Explore our content via our Linktree [**bel.sciences**](https://linktr.ee/bel.sciences){.btn-surface .c-purple .btn-compact}.

---

## Graphic Design & Collaboration

### Identity & Logo Design
I occasionally collaborate on visual identity and graphic materials for scientific networks and working groups. This includes designing the official logo for the **WOST** (WithOut SpaceTime) network.
